title: Janata Ki Adalat
subTitle: A prisoner named Shankar decides to murder a minister but his plans are thwarted by DCP Jyoti. However, Jyoti later teams up with Shankar after she learns about the minister's true colours.

title: Main Tera Dushman
subTitle: When a Forest Officer, Kishan Srivastav, hinders the criminal activities of Thakur Dayalu, he is framed for murder and sent to jail. Later, Kishan escapes prison and tries to clear his name.

title: Panipuri
subTitle: Panipuri

title: Police Aur Mujrim
subTitle: After DSP Vishal arrests two thugs, their boss kidnaps the commissioner's daughter. But after Vishal rescues the girl and jails the thugs, they return to hurt Vishal and the commissioner's families.

title: Tiger One Man Army
subTitle: Subbu, a college student, falls in love with the affluent Neeraja. However, things take a turn when he realises that Neeraja's father was responsible for the death of his entire family.

title: Khiladiyon Ka Khiladi
subTitle: A man comes to America in order to find his brother who is wanted by the police. But his search forces him to get mixed up with a lady gangster that facilitates illegal underground fights.

title: Toofan
subTitle: Separated at birth, the paths of Shyam, a lousy magician unwittingly roped into a crime, and Toofan, a defender of the people, cross again years later as they reunite to avenge their father.

title: Prem Granth
subTitle: Somen, a rich man, falls in love with Kajri, a village belle. However, they get separated when she suddenly leaves for unknown reasons.

title: Krack
subTitle: When three notorious criminals lock horns with a hot-tempered police officer, Potharaju Shankar, little do they know that they will end up behind bars.

title: Indian
subTitle: Police officer Raj Azad arrests terrorist Wasim Khan and prepares to interrogate him. However, his father-in-law mysteriously dies, after which he is blamed for his death and goes on the run.

title: Encounter Shankar
subTitle: Post his transfer to a village, an encounter specialist sets out to stop a crime boss who wants to build a power plant in the region despite strong public opposition.

title: Encounter Shankar
subTitle: Post his transfer to a village, an encounter specialist sets out to stop a crime boss who wants to build a power plant in the region despite strong public opposition.

title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
subTitle: Ravi Kapoor, a police officer and Sonu Dada, a former criminal join hands together to take down a notorious gangster, Chandi Das.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Khoon Bhari Maang
subTitle: Widowed Aarti falls prey to Sanjay's vicious plan of getting married to him. Later, with the help of her best friend Nandini, he drowns Aarti and seizes her wealth but she survives and seeks revenge.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Diya
subTitle: Thulasi, a young woman, accidentally gets pregnant before marriage and is forced to abort the child by her family. Years later, she is visited by the spirit of her unborn daughter.

title: Sandwich
subTitle: Sher Singh has two wives, Nisha and Sweety, and juggles his time between them. However, when his two wives cross paths, his troubles increase manifold leading to hilarious situations.

title: Seetimaarr
subTitle: A strong-willed coach encounters a series of sinister impediments along his journey to turn a little-known women's kabaddi team into national champions.

title: Jai Simha
subTitle: Narasimha, a fiery but kind-hearted mechanic, becomes the guardian of an innocent family. Subsequently, he ends up taking on the ruthless kingpin Kariappan and his violent gang to protect them.

title: Pralay the Destroyer
subTitle: Some thugs annihilate an entire family and flee the scene without facing any consequences. Years later, the universe balances the scales of justice through the sole survivor of the tragedy.

title: Ram Lakhan
subTitle: Ram, an upright police officer, and his brother Lakhan, a playboy, vow vengeance when they learn that their father was killed by two wicked tricksters.

title: Kohram
subTitle: When a teacher is killed by two village tyrants, Thakur and Kalia, his brother Arjun swears to avenge him. Years later, Arjun kills Thakur and then joins forces with his brother's sons to face Kalia.

title: Kohram
subTitle: When a teacher is killed by two village tyrants, Thakur and Kalia, his brother Arjun swears to avenge him. Years later, Arjun kills Thakur and then joins forces with his brother's sons to face Kalia.

title: Ganga Tere Desh Mein
subTitle: After arresting and institutionalising a notorious criminal who has lost his mental faculties, inspector Ajay finds his mother feeding the criminal. But when he digs deeper he uncovers a tragic truth.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
subTitle: Three friends, orphaned by an evil man, set out to take revenge for their father's murders. They are forced to navigate a complex web of deceit and stolen identities before they can reach their goal.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Prithviraj Chauhan
subTitle: Prithviraj Chauhan, a great ruler, strives to overcome multiple challenges in order to defeat his enemies and ensure peace in his kingdom.

title: Devi
subTitle: Devi, a snake goddess, vows to protect the daughter of the man who died while trying to save her from a powerful demon. However, she falls in love with a human, unaware of the consequences.

title: Sirf Tum
subTitle: Deepak and Aarti fall in love with each other without ever meeting each other. Later, Aarti sets out to look for him in the city of Delhi.

title: Jaanwar
subTitle: A criminal changes the course of his life when he decides to raise a baby who has survived a train crash, but chaos ensues when his past begins to haunt him.

title: Bruce Lee: The Fighter
subTitle: Kartik sacrifices his studies for his sister and becomes a stuntman. But he ends up helping a cop to unearth the evil designs of Deepak.

title: Phool Aur Angaar
subTitle: A young man rescues a woman from being molested but gets accused of the heinous crime instead. Trying to apprehend the miscreants, he gets caught in a web of deception and lies.

title: Khal Nayak
subTitle: Inspector Ram succeeds in nabbing notorious criminal Ballu. When Ballu's escape taints Ram's name, his fiancée, Ganga, decides to trap Ballu. But, things get complicated when Ballu starts liking her.
